options.content:
## Session Detail
Single-session investigation: spans, tool waterfall, runtime events, token/cost breakdown, and safety signals.

azureLogAnalytics.query: AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where Properties has 'github.copilot' and Properties has 'github-copilot-cli' | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), conversation=coalesce(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id']), strcat(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.id']), '_', tostring(Properties['github.copilot.turn_count']), '_', format_datetime(bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), 'yyyyMMdd_HHmm'))), agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), tool=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']), repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']), error=tostring(Properties['error.type']) | where ('$model' == '$__all' or model in (${model:singlequote})) | where ('$operation' == '$__all' or operation in (${operation:singlequote})) | where ('$agent' == '$__all' or agent in (${agent:singlequote})) | where ('$repo' == '$__all' or repo in (${repo:singlequote})) | where ('$tool' == '$__all' or tool in (${tool:singlequote})) | where ('$conversation' == '$__all' or conversation == '$conversation') | summarize Spans=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval) | order by TimeGenerated asc

AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where Properties has 'github.copilot' and Properties has 'github-copilot-cli' | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), conversation=coalesce(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id']), strcat(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.id']), '_', tostring(Properties['github.copilot.turn_count']), '_', format_datetime(bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), 'yyyyMMdd_HHmm'))), agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), tool=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']), repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']), error=tostring(Properties['error.type']) | where ('$model' == '$__all' or model in (${model:singlequote})) | where ('$operation' == '$__all' or operation in (${operation:singlequote})) | where ('$agent' == '$__all' or agent in (${agent:singlequote})) | where ('$repo' == '$__all' or repo in (${repo:singlequote})) | where ('$tool' == '$__all' or tool in (${tool:singlequote})) | where ('$conversation' == '$__all' or conversation == '$conversation') | summarize Failures=countif(Success == false or isnotempty(error)) by bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval) | order by TimeGenerated asc

AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where Properties has 'github.copilot' and Properties has 'github-copilot-cli' | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), conversation=coalesce(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id']), strcat(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.id']), '_', tostring(Properties['github.copilot.turn_count']), '_', format_datetime(bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), 'yyyyMMdd_HHmm'))), agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), tool=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']), repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']), error=tostring(Properties['error.type']) | where ('$model' == '$__all' or model in (${model:singlequote})) | where ('$operation' == '$__all' or operation in (${operation:singlequote})) | where ('$agent' == '$__all' or agent in (${agent:singlequote})) | where ('$repo' == '$__all' or repo in (${repo:singlequote})) | where ('$tool' == '$__all' or tool in (${tool:singlequote})) | where ('$conversation' == '$__all' or conversation == '$conversation') | extend Tokens=coalesce(todouble(Properties['gen_ai.usage.input_tokens']), 0.0) + coalesce(todouble(Properties['gen_ai.usage.output_tokens']), 0.0) | summarize Tokens=sum(Tokens) by bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval) | order by TimeGenerated asc

AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where Properties has 'github.copilot' and Properties has 'github-copilot-cli' | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), conversation=coalesce(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id']), strcat(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.id']), '_', tostring(Properties['github.copilot.turn_count']), '_', format_datetime(bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), 'yyyyMMdd_HHmm'))), agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), tool=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']), repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']), error=tostring(Properties['error.type']) | where ('$model' == '$__all' or model in (${model:singlequote})) | where ('$operation' == '$__all' or operation in (${operation:singlequote})) | where ('$agent' == '$__all' or agent in (${agent:singlequote})) | where ('$repo' == '$__all' or repo in (${repo:singlequote})) | where ('$tool' == '$__all' or tool in (${tool:singlequote})) | where ('$conversation' == '$__all' or conversation == '$conversation') | extend Credits=todouble(Properties['github.copilot.cost']) | summarize EstUsd=sum(Credits) * 0.01 by bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval) | order by TimeGenerated asc

AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where Properties has 'github.copilot' and Properties has 'github-copilot-cli' | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), conversation=coalesce(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id']), strcat(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.id']), '_', tostring(Properties['github.copilot.turn_count']), '_', format_datetime(bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), 'yyyyMMdd_HHmm'))), agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), tool=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']), repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']), error=tostring(Properties['error.type']) | where ('$model' == '$__all' or model in (${model:singlequote})) | where ('$operation' == '$__all' or operation in (${operation:singlequote})) | where ('$agent' == '$__all' or agent in (${agent:singlequote})) | where ('$repo' == '$__all' or repo in (${repo:singlequote})) | where ('$tool' == '$__all' or tool in (${tool:singlequote})) | where ('$conversation' == '$__all' or conversation == '$conversation') | project TimeGenerated, OperationId, ParentId, Id, operation, Name, agent, model, tool, repo, DurationMs, Success, ResultCode, error, Properties | order by TimeGenerated asc

AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where Properties has 'github.copilot' and Properties has 'github-copilot-cli' | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), conversation=coalesce(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id']), strcat(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.id']), '_', tostring(Properties['github.copilot.turn_count']), '_', format_datetime(bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), 'yyyyMMdd_HHmm'))), agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), tool=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']), repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']), error=tostring(Properties['error.type']) | where ('$model' == '$__all' or model in (${model:singlequote})) | where ('$operation' == '$__all' or operation in (${operation:singlequote})) | where ('$agent' == '$__all' or agent in (${agent:singlequote})) | where ('$repo' == '$__all' or repo in (${repo:singlequote})) | where ('$tool' == '$__all' or tool in (${tool:singlequote})) | where ('$conversation' == '$__all' or conversation == '$conversation') | summarize DurationMs=avg(DurationMs) by bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval), operation | order by TimeGenerated asc

AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where Properties has 'github.copilot' and Properties has 'github-copilot-cli' | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), conversation=coalesce(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id']), strcat(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.id']), '_', tostring(Properties['github.copilot.turn_count']), '_', format_datetime(bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), 'yyyyMMdd_HHmm'))), agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), tool=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']), repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']), error=tostring(Properties['error.type']) | where ('$model' == '$__all' or model in (${model:singlequote})) | where ('$operation' == '$__all' or operation in (${operation:singlequote})) | where ('$agent' == '$__all' or agent in (${agent:singlequote})) | where ('$repo' == '$__all' or repo in (${repo:singlequote})) | where ('$tool' == '$__all' or tool in (${tool:singlequote})) | where ('$conversation' == '$__all' or conversation == '$conversation') | where operation == 'execute_tool' or isnotempty(tool) | project TimeGenerated, tool, Name, DurationMs, Success, ResultCode, error | order by TimeGenerated asc

union isfuzzy=true AppTraces, AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where tostring(Properties) has 'github.copilot' or Message has 'github.copilot' | extend conversation=coalesce(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id']), strcat(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.id']), '_', tostring(Properties['github.copilot.turn_count']), '_', format_datetime(bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), 'yyyyMMdd_HHmm'))), operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), tool=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']), repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']), error=tostring(Properties['error.type']) | where ('$conversation' == '$__all' or conversation == '$conversation') | where tostring(Properties) has 'github.copilot.session' or tostring(Properties) has 'github.copilot.skill' or tostring(Properties) has 'github.copilot.hook' or tostring(Properties) has 'github.copilot.tokens_removed' or isnotempty(error) | extend event=coalesce(tostring(Properties['event.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.event.name']), Name), skill=tostring(Properties['github.copilot.skill.name']), hook=tostring(Properties['github.copilot.hook.name']), tokens_removed=toint(Properties['github.copilot.tokens_removed']) | project TimeGenerated, event, operation, agent, model, tool, skill, hook, tokens_removed, error, Message | order by TimeGenerated asc

AppDependencies | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d) | where Properties has 'github.copilot' and Properties has 'github-copilot-cli' | extend conversation=coalesce(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id']), strcat(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.id']), '_', tostring(Properties['github.copilot.turn_count']), '_', format_datetime(bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), 'yyyyMMdd_HHmm'))) | where isnotempty(conversation) | distinct conversation | order by conversation desc

AppDependencies | where TimeGenerated > ago(14d) | where Properties has 'github.copilot' and Properties has 'github-copilot-cli' | extend model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']) | where isnotempty(model) | distinct model | order by model asc

AppDependencies | where TimeGenerated > ago(14d) | where Properties has 'github.copilot' and Properties has 'github-copilot-cli' | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']) | where isnotempty(operation) | distinct operation | order by operation asc

AppDependencies | where TimeGenerated > ago(14d) | where Properties has 'github.copilot' and Properties has 'github-copilot-cli' | extend agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']) | where isnotempty(agent) | distinct agent | order by agent asc

AppDependencies | where TimeGenerated > ago(14d) | where Properties has 'github.copilot' and Properties has 'github-copilot-cli' | extend repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']) | where isnotempty(repo) | distinct repo | order by repo asc

AppDependencies | where TimeGenerated > ago(14d) | where Properties has 'github.copilot' and Properties has 'github-copilot-cli' | extend tool=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']) | where isnotempty(tool) | distinct tool | order by tool asc
